text: I feel a sense of anticipation, hanging between moments—something has started but not yet finished. The quiet corridor and the tidy, waiting chairs behind the glass suggest a pause before an event, perhaps the resumption of a journey or a story. The vibrant colors and bold words in the exhibit room contrast with the stillness outside, sparking my curiosity and hopefulness for what will unfold. The world feels unfinished, brimming with questions, and I am eager to see what comes next.
